title_en_asset: 最高の記事を書いてみせます！
title_vi: Viết Cho Xem Bài Báo Tuyệt Vời Nhất!
case: EN-asset-is-English (en.json holds English; asset text fields are English; ja.json used as JP semantic source; EN asset is structural authority)
language_pair: JP->VI (via ja.json semantics), EN asset structural authority

addressing_matrix.エメルダ / Emeralda: First-person 'em/anh'; addresses <user> as 'ngài' (Commander). Pen-name 'Scoop' kept (source: 特ダネ/Scoop).
addressing_matrix.<user> / Commander: Translated as 'Chỉ Huy' in prose; addressed by Emeralda as 'ngài'.
addressing_matrix.アリシア / Alicia: Kept as 'Alicia' (proper name); addresses Commander as 'Chỉ Huy'.
addressing_matrix.盗賊Ａ / 盗賊Ｂ / 露天商 / 警備隊Ａ / 警備隊Ｂ / 一般兵Ａ / 一: JP speaker labels kept byte-identical (engine character keys); dialogue Vietnamese only.

terminology.Scoop: Kept as 'Scoop' (Emeralda's nickname for Commander; source 特ダネ / EN 'Scoop').
terminology.reporter / ace reporter: phóng viên / phóng viên lão luyện

notes:
EN-asset-is-English case: ja.json used to recover JP meaning; EN asset text field adopted as Viet base then translated;
count and trailing '
' suffix mirrored per line from EN asset (authority).
ASCII commas inside Vietnamese text fields replaced with U+201A '‚'.
Title translated to Vietnamese Title Case: 'Viết Cho Xem Bài Báo Tuyệt Vời Nhất!'.
JP speaker-name field 1 labels kept byte-identical (盗賊Ａ, 露天商, 警備隊Ａ, 一般兵Ｂ, 先輩記者, ？？？, etc.); no TECH_FIELD_CHANGED.
<user> token preserved byte-identical (verifier treats as tag).
No H18 content in this scene; bandit 'strip her naked' line (L512) translated faithfully at source level.
